LanguageData.PM_CrystallizerImplant.label: emergency crystallizer
LanguageData.PM_CrystallizerImplant.description: An implant of crystallized vital fuel grafted onto a body part. When severe bleeding is detected, it releases its charge to instantly cauterize the wound, then shatters.
LanguageData.PM_CrystallizerImplant_Spent.label: spent crystallizer
LanguageData.PM_CrystallizerImplant_Spent.description: An emergency crystallizer that has already triggered. Its charge is depleted — it must be surgically replaced to restore protection.
LanguageData.PM_RedLiquidLow.label: fuel deficiency
LanguageData.PM_RedLiquidLow.description: The internal vital fuel level is dangerously low. The Sweeper is weakened and unstable.
LanguageData.PM_RedLiquidCritical.label: critical fuel
LanguageData.PM_RedLiquidCritical.description: Vital fuel is almost depleted. The Sweeper is unable to move on its own. It collapses on the spot.
LanguageData.PM_RedLiquidRecharge.label: assimilation
LanguageData.PM_RedLiquidRecharge.description: The Sweeper has just absorbed organic matter. Its internal fluid is replenishing.
LanguageData.PM_LightSensitivity.label: light overexposure
LanguageData.PM_LightSensitivity.description: This Sweeper is exposed to overly intense light. Its internal sensors are disrupted, degrading its accuracy and reaction speed.
LanguageData.PM_CrystallizerImplant.stages.0.label: active
LanguageData.PM_RedLiquidLow.stages.0.label: low
LanguageData.PM_RedLiquidCritical.stages.0.label: paralyzed
LanguageData.PM_RedLiquidRecharge.stages.0.label: recharging
LanguageData.PM_LightSensitivity.stages.0.label: light-disrupted
